title: Waitresses 2004: Theme Interviews
description: The data were collected through theme interviews of eight waitresses or restaurateurs in Pirkanmaa region, Finland. The female interviewees, aged approximately 30-65, had long careers in the industry, and the restaurants they worked in could accommodate 45-220 customers. The restaurants were located in suburbs or rural population centres.
